title: Forga Rocketing ( Better Performance and Shaders Available)
description: A client side modpack. Enjoy your insane fps !!
body:
🧠 Ultra FPS Boost – Forge 1.20.1 Modpack
Built for Maximum Performance | Embeddium Killer | Client-Side Only

📦 Version: Minecraft 1.20.1 (Forge)
⚙️ Performance-focused | 🚀 Insane FPS Gains | 🧊 Smooth Gameplay

🔥 Description:
Tired of lag? Want buttery-smooth FPS in Minecraft without sacrificing visuals?
Ultra FPS Boost for Forge 1.20.1 is a powerful, lightweight modpack designed exclusively for insane client-side performance. Whether you're playing on a potato PC or a high-end rig, this pack guarantees massive FPS improvement over default Minecraft — even outperforming mods like Embeddium and other optimization setups.

This modpack includes hand-picked, cutting-edge client-side mods to:

✂️ Aggressively cull unnecessary renders

📉 Reduce memory usage and background load

🚫 Eliminate lag spikes and frame drops

🌈 Keep visuals clean and unaltered (No texture loss!)

✅ Features:
💨 Insane FPS boosts even on low-end systems

🧠 Smart rendering and culling optimizations

🧱 100% Client-Side Only – Safe for servers

🔧 No setup needed – Plug & Play!

🎮 Compatible with most vanilla and Forge multiplayer servers

📦 Pre-installed Mods Include:
(These may vary depending on what you’ve added – customize this as needed)

Embeddium (Forge-exclusive optimization mod, probably the best in forge )

ModernFix – Reduces memory usage and improves startup

FerriteCore – RAM optimizations

ImmediatelyFast – Lightning-fast chunk rendering

Starlight – Instant light engine

Smooth Boot – Reduces CPU load on startup

Dynamic FPS – Pauses rendering when inactive

…and more fine-tuned for peak performance!

🚀 Installation:
Download the modpack using the CurseForge app

Launch Minecraft via CurseForge

Enjoy ultra-smooth, high-FPS Minecraft!

❤️ Support & Feedback:
If you enjoy this pack, consider leaving a 👍 and sharing it with others!
